description: During vessel operations, a quay crane suddenly stops working. The shift manager must manage the situation to minimize delays.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert that a crane has broken down and is no longer operational.

expected_outcome.value: Manager is notified that QC-02 has a 'Spreader Fault' and is stopped.

nodes.task_description: Immediately create a high-priority maintenance work order and dispatch the on-duty engineering team.

expected_outcome.value: A priority 1 work order is sent to the maintenance crew.

nodes.task_description: Re-assign the broken crane's remaining work instructions to other operating cranes on the vessel.

expected_outcome.value: The work queue for QC-02 is redistributed to QC-01 and QC-03 to continue operations.
